positive: A minimalist, geometric composition featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be rendered with clean, sharp edges and a palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and muted teal. Foreground elements include abstract mountain peaks and geometric line work suggesting high altitude. The style must be vector-art inspired, high-contrast, clean graphic design suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on negative space and strong, easily reproducible colors. Central composition, perfect symmetry suggested.
